title: AMD HLS and implementation interpretation rules (2024.2 references)

metadata.content_policy: Project-authored paraphrases and citations only; referenced documents are not redistributed.

documents.title: Vitis High-Level Synthesis User Guide
documents.license_note: Reference metadata only; the guide is not included in HLSGraph.

documents.title: Vivado Design Suite User Guide: Using Constraints
documents.license_note: Reference metadata only; the guide is not included in HLSGraph.

documents.title: Vivado Design Suite Tcl Command Reference Guide
documents.license_note: Reference metadata only; the guide is not included in HLSGraph.

rules.title: Keep requested directives separate from achieved behavior
rules.summary: An optimization request can be relaxed or remain unmet, so the request and the tool-reported result must be stored separately.
rules.license_note: Short project-authored paraphrase; no vendor text is redistributed.

rules.title: Scope dataflow profiling results to the cosimulation workload
rules.summary: FIFO occupancy and stall measurements produced during RTL cosimulation describe that testbench run, not every possible input workload.
rules.license_note: Short project-authored paraphrase; no vendor text is redistributed.

rules.title: Treat schedule control steps as compiler decisions
rules.summary: Operation placement in control steps is compiler schedule evidence and should retain links back to the reported operation and source location.
rules.license_note: Short project-authored paraphrase; no vendor text is redistributed.

rules.title: Record XDC constraints as versioned design inputs
rules.summary: Implementation results depend on the applied XDC constraints, so their identity and hash belong in the design snapshot.
rules.license_note: Short project-authored paraphrase; no vendor text is redistributed.

rules.title: Preserve WNS, TNS, and endpoint counts as separate observations
rules.summary: A timing summary reports multiple timing measures; do not collapse slack, total negative slack, and failing endpoint counts into one value.
rules.license_note: Short project-authored paraphrase; no vendor text is redistributed.
